120  class ModifiedProperty
121  {
122  public:
123  ModifiedProperty(const Arcane::String& property_name, Arcane::IVariableMng* variable_mng);
124  ModifiedProperty(const Arcane::String& property_name);
125  ModifiedProperty(const PropertyDescription& property_description);
126  operator bool() {return (!m_is_empty);}
127  operator Arcane::VariableItemByte();
128  operator Arcane::IVariable*() const {return m_filled_item_variable;}
129  bool operator== (const ModifiedProperty& modified_property);
130  bool operator< (const ModifiedProperty& modified_property) const;
131  const Arcane::String name() const {return m_property_name;}
132  private:
133  bool m_is_empty;
134  Arcane::IVariable* m_filled_item_variable;
135  Arcane::String m_property_name;
136  Arcane::IVariableMng* m_variable_mng;
137  };
138 
140  class ModifiedProperties
141  {
142  private:
143  typedef std::set<ModifiedProperty > ModifiedPropertiesType;
144  ModifiedPropertiesType m_properties;
145  Arcane::IVariableMng* m_variable_mng;
146  public:
147  typedef ModifiedPropertiesType::const_iterator const_iterator;
148  typedef ModifiedPropertiesType::iterator iterator;
149  public:
150  ModifiedProperties(Arcane::IVariableMng* variable_mng) : m_variable_mng(variable_mng){}
151  ModifiedProperty operator[](const Arcane::String& property_name) const;
152  void add(const PropertyDescription& property_description) {m_properties.insert(property_description);}
153  void clear() {m_properties.clear();} // free memory
154  iterator begin() {return m_properties.begin();}
155  iterator end() {return m_properties.end();}
156  };
157 
158  // Modified Properties : during the current event or through the whole simulation
159  ModifiedProperties m_current_modified_properties;
160  ModifiedProperties m_modified_property_history;
161 
162  typedef std::list<PropertyDescription* > DescriptionContainer;
163  DescriptionContainer m_current_property_description;
164 
165  //IEvolutiveMesh* const m_evolutive_mesh; //!<Interface du service contenant le PropertyManager. Pour suivre les ajouts d'items.
166 
167 
168  // Event Information
169  Real m_event_begin_time;
170  Real m_event_end_time;
171 
172  // Check tools
173  bool m_is_event_loaded = false;
174  bool m_is_event_conform = false;
175  bool m_is_property_loaded = false;
176  typedef std::map<String,bool> PropertyConformityType;
177  PropertyConformityType m_is_property_conform;
178 
179  // State information
180  bool m_has_face_property;
181 
182  // Arcane tools
183  IMesh* m_mesh = nullptr;
184 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
185  IGraph2* m_graph = nullptr ;
186 #endif
187  ITraceMng* m_trace_mng = nullptr;
188 
189  Arcane::String m_mesh_directory_name;
190 
191 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
192  void _unloadEvent();
193  void _unloadProperty();
194  void _checkPeriodEventConformity(const IXMPropertyIncrementDataList& properties, const Real& event_begin_time, const Real& event_end_time);
195  void _checkDateEventConformity(const IXMPropertyIncrementDataList& properties, const Real& event_time);
196 #endif
197 
198  void _createPropertyData(const PropertyDescription& description);
199  bool _handleErrorStatus(bool has_error,const String & message);
200  void _storePropertyVariableRef(Arcane::VariableRef* const created_property_variable_ref);
201 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
202  void _updateFilledItemVariable(Arcane::IVariable* filled_item_ivariable);
203 #endif
204  void _addModifiedProperty(const ArcGeoSim::IXMPropertyBuilderImpl::PropertyDescription& property_description);
205  bool _isPropertyInitialized(const PropertyDescription& description, const Arcane::ItemGroup& item_group);

208 public:
209 
210  class BaseProperty
211  {
212  public :
213  BaseProperty(Arcane::IMesh* const mesh)
214  : m_mesh(mesh)
215  {}
216 
217 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 22200)
218  void setGraph(IGraph2* graph) {
219  m_graph = graph ;
220  }
221 #endif
222 
223  Arcane::IItemFamily* itemFamily(Arcane::eItemKind item_kind)
224  {
225 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 22200)
226  if (item_kind == Arcane::IK_Particle)
227  {
228  return m_mesh->findItemFamily(IK_Particle,"Particle",true);
229  }
230  if (item_kind == ItemConnectionImpl::ik_type)
231  {
232  assert(m_graph!=nullptr) ;
233  return m_graph->linkFamily() ;
234  }
235  else
236  {
237  return m_mesh->itemFamily(item_kind);
238  }
239 #else
240  if (item_kind == Arcane::IK_Particle)
241  {
242  return m_mesh->findItemFamily(IK_Particle,"Particle",true);
243  }
244  else
245  {
246  return m_mesh->itemFamily(item_kind);
247  }
248 #endif
249  }
250  protected :
251  IMesh* const m_mesh = nullptr ;
252 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 22200)
253  IGraph2* m_graph = nullptr ;
254 #endif
255  } ;
256 
257  class PropertyDescription : public BaseProperty
258  {
259  public:
260  using BaseType = BaseProperty ;
261 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
262  PropertyDescription(Arcane::IMesh* const mesh, Arcane::IGraph2* graph) noexcept(false) ;
263 #else
264  PropertyDescription(Arcane::IMesh* const mesh) noexcept(false) ;
265 #endif
266  /*
267  PropertyDescription(const IXMPropertyIncrementData& property,
268  IEvolutiveMesh* const evolutive_mesh,
269  Arcane::IMesh* const mesh,
270 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 22200)
271  Arcane::IGraph2* graph,
272 #endif
273  const bool check_property_existence) noexcept(false) ;
274  */
275 
276  PropertyDescription(const IXMPropertyData& property,
277 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
278  Arcane::IMesh* const mesh, Arcane::IGraph2* graph) noexcept(false) ;
279 #else
280  Arcane::IMesh* const mesh) noexcept(false) ;
281 #endif
282  public:
283 
284  virtual ~PropertyDescription();
285 
286  public:
287 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
288  void createPropertyValues(const Real& begin_event_time, const Real& end_event_time,
289  const IXMPropertyIncrementValuesDataList& values_list, const Int64Array& support,
290  const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids, const Arcane::String& mesh_directory_name) noexcept(false) ;
291 #endif
292  void createPropertyValues(const IXMPropertyValuesData& values, const Int64Array& support,
293  const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids, const Arcane::String& mesh_directory_name) noexcept(false) ;
294 
295  IVariable* filledItemVariable() const {return m_filled_item_variable;}
296 
297  void saveInitialPropertyVariable();
298 
299  virtual void saveModifiedItems(const ItemGroup& modified_items);// save filled items in an allMesh Arcane Variable
300 
301  const String name() const {return m_name;}
302 
303  PropertyValues* settedPropertyValues() {return m_setted_property_values;}
304 
305  PropertyValues* evolvingPropertyValues() {return m_evolving_property_values;}
306 
307  ItemGroup group() {return m_group;}
308 
309  eItemKind itemKind() {return ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::itemKindFromIXMName(m_kind);}
310 
311  const String dataType() {return m_type;}
312 
313  IVariable* const variable() {return m_property_variable;}
314 
315  void printInfos() const;
316 
317  static const String modifiedItemsVariableName(const String& property_name) {return String::concat(property_name,"_modified_items");}
318 
319  Arcane::VariableRef* createdPropertyVariableRef() {return m_created_property_variable_ref;}
320 
321  Arcane::Integer arraySize() {return m_array_size;}
322 
323  bool isGlobal() {return m_is_global;}
324 
325  protected:
326  String m_name;
327  String m_type;
328  String m_group_name;
329  String m_kind;
330  IVariable* m_property_variable = nullptr;
331  IVariable* m_initial_property_variable = nullptr;
332  PropertyValues* m_setted_property_values = nullptr;
333  PropertyValues* m_evolving_property_values = nullptr;
334  IVariable* m_filled_item_variable = nullptr;
335  //IEvolutiveMesh* const m_evolutive_mesh;
336  ITraceMng* m_trace_mng = nullptr ;
337  bool m_is_initial_property_saved = false;
338  Integer m_dimension;
339  Integer m_array_size;
340  VariableRef* m_created_property_variable_ref = nullptr;
341  Arcane::ItemGroup m_group;
342  bool m_is_global;
343 
344  protected:
345  void _loadPropertyVariable(const bool check_property_existence) noexcept(false) ;
346  void _loadMeshVariable(const bool check_property_existence) noexcept(false) ;
347  void _loadGlobalVariable(const bool check_property_existence) noexcept(false) ;
348  void _checkPropertyDescription() const noexcept(false) ;
349 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIF
350  const IXMPropertyIncrementValuesData _findValuesData(const IXMPropertyIncrementValuesDataList& values_list,const Real& time) const;
351 #endif
352  template <class PropertyValuesData>
353  bool _isPropertyEmpty(const PropertyValuesData& values_list, const Arcane::Int64Array& support) const;
354  void _deleteInitialPropertyVariable();
355  void _deletePropertyValues();
356  void _setPropertyDimension(const Arcane::Integer& property_data_array_size);
357  };
358 
359  class PropertyValues : public BaseProperty
360  {
361  public:
362  PropertyValues(PropertyDescription* const parent_description,
363  IVariable* const property,
364  IMesh* const mesh,
365 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
366  Arcane::IGraph2* graph,
367 #endif
368  const Arcane::String& mesh_directory_name);
369  /*
370  PropertyValues(const IXMPropertyIncrementValuesData& property_values,
371  const Int64Array& support,
372  const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids,
373  PropertyDescription* const parent_description,
374  IVariable* const property,
375  const String & status,
376  IEvolutiveMesh* const evolutive_mesh,
377  IMesh* const mesh,
378 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
379  Arcane::IGraph2* graph,
380 #endif
381  const Arcane::String& mesh_directory_name);*/
382 
383  PropertyValues(const IXMPropertyValuesData& property_values,
384  const Int64Array& support,
385  const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids,
386  PropertyDescription* const parent_description,
387  IVariable* const property,
388  const String & status,
389  IMesh* const mesh,
390 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
391  Arcane::IGraph2* graph,
392 #endif
393  const Arcane::String& mesh_directory_name);
394 
395  virtual ~PropertyValues(){delete m_values_mng;if (m_item_values_indexes) delete m_item_values_indexes;};
396 
397  public:
398  enum eFillPropertyChoice {WithInterpolatedValues, WithReadValues};
399 
400  public:
401  void fillPropertyVariable(const eFillPropertyChoice& fill_property_choice);
402 
403  void saveInitialProperty(IVariable* const initial_variable){m_initial_property = initial_variable;}
404 
405  void extractPropertyVariableInitialValues();
406 
407  void computeInterpolatedValues(const Real& end_timestep,const Real& event_begin_time,const Real& event_end_time);
408 
409  void updateLocalValues();
410 
411  void printInfos() const;
412 
413  Arcane::ItemGroup support() const {return m_support_group;}
414 
415  protected:
416  String m_values_status;
417  ArcGeoSim::ArrayMng* m_values_mng = nullptr;
418  ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::GenericArray m_values;
419  ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::GenericArray m_local_values;
420  ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::GenericArray m_initial_values;
421  ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::GenericArray m_interpolated_values;
422  Real m_time = 0.;
423  ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::VariableView m_property;
424  ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::VariableView m_initial_property;
425  PropertyDescription* const m_parent_property_description = nullptr;
426  //IEvolutiveMesh* const m_evolutive_mesh;
427  ITraceMng* m_trace_mng = nullptr;
428  ItemGroup m_support_group;
429  Arcane::PartialVariableItemArrayInt64* m_item_values_indexes = nullptr;
430  Arcane::String m_mesh_directory_name;
431 
432  protected:
433  void _buildSupportGroup(const Int64ConstArrayView& support_uids, const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids);
434  template <class PropertyValuesData>
435  void _buildPropertyValues(const PropertyValuesData& values_data,
436  const Int64Array& support_uids,
437  const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids);
438  template <class PropertyValuesData>
439  void _registerValues(const PropertyValuesData& property_values);
440  void _checkItemsInVariableGroup(const Arcane::ItemVectorView& variable_group, const Arcane::Int32Array& items, const Arcane::Int64Array& item_uids);
441  Arcane::String _supportGroupName() {return String::format("property_{0}_{1}_values",m_parent_property_description->name(),m_values_status);}
442  Arcane::String _itemValuesIndexesVariableName() {return String::format("{0}{1}ValuesItemValuesIndexesVariable",m_parent_property_description->name(),m_values_status);}
443  };
444 
445 };
446 
447 
448 template<class PropertyValuesData>
449 bool
450 IXMPropertyBuilderImpl::PropertyDescription::
451 _isPropertyEmpty(const PropertyValuesData& values_data, const Arcane::Int64Array& support) const
452 {
453  if (values_data.empty() && support.empty()) return true;
454  else return false;
455 }
456 
457 
458 template <class PropertyValuesData>
459 void
460 IXMPropertyBuilderImpl::PropertyValues::
461 _buildPropertyValues(const PropertyValuesData& property_values,
462  const Int64Array& support_uids,
463  const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids)
464 {
465  using namespace ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMPropertyExceptions;
466  // Read values node
467  _registerValues(property_values);
468 
469  // m_trace_mng->info() << "--------------m_values--------------------";
470 
471  // m_trace_mng->info() << m_values;
472 
473  // Check support/values coherence
474  Arcane::Integer support_size = (m_parent_property_description->isGlobal()) ? 1 :support_uids.size();
475  Arcane::Integer total_size = support_size*m_parent_property_description->arraySize();
476  if (total_size != m_values.size()) throw InconsistentPropertyDescriptionException (
477  m_parent_property_description->name(),
478  Arcane::String::format("number of elements in values {0} is not correct. Support = {1}, support uids {2}",m_values.size(),support_size, support_uids.size() ));
479 
480  // Build support item group
481  _buildSupportGroup(support_uids,aid_to_lids);
482 }
483 
484 
485 template <class PropertyValuesData>
486 void
487 IXMPropertyBuilderImpl::PropertyValues::
488 _registerValues(const PropertyValuesData& property_values)
489 {
490  using namespace ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::IXMPropertyExceptions;
491  Arcane::eDataType data_type = ArcGeoSim::IXMTools::dataTypeFromIXMName(m_parent_property_description->dataType());
492  switch (data_type) {
493  case Arcane::DT_Byte:
494  m_values_mng = new ArcGeoSim::ArrayMngT<Byte> (this->m_mesh->subDomain());
495  break;
496  case Arcane::DT_Int32:
497  m_values_mng = new ArcGeoSim::ArrayMngT<Int32> (this->m_mesh->subDomain());
498  break;
499  case Arcane::DT_Int64:
500  m_values_mng = new ArcGeoSim::ArrayMngT<Int64> (this->m_mesh->subDomain());
501  break;
502  case Arcane::DT_Real:
503  m_values_mng = new ArcGeoSim::ArrayMngT<Real> (this->m_mesh->subDomain());
504  break;
505  case Arcane::DT_Real2:
506  m_values_mng = new ArcGeoSim::ArrayMngT<Real2> (this->m_mesh->subDomain());
507  break;
508  case Arcane::DT_Real2x2:
509  m_values_mng = new ArcGeoSim::ArrayMngT<Real2x2> (this->m_mesh->subDomain());
510  break;
511  case Arcane::DT_Real3:
512  m_values_mng = new ArcGeoSim::ArrayMngT<Real3> (this->m_mesh->subDomain());
513  break;
514  case Arcane::DT_Real3x3:
515  m_values_mng = new ArcGeoSim::ArrayMngT<Real3x3> (this->m_mesh->subDomain());
516  break;
517  case Arcane::DT_String:
518  throw InconsistentPropertyDescriptionException(m_parent_property_description->name(),"string not allowed as a ixm property data type");
519  break;
520  case Arcane::DT_Unknown:
521  throw InconsistentPropertyDescriptionException(m_parent_property_description->name(),"unknown ixm property data type");
522  break;
523  }
524 
525  // Get string
526  String values_string = property_values.data_string;
527 
528  if (values_string.empty()) throw InconsistentPropertyDescriptionException(
529  m_parent_property_description->name(),
530  "property values is empty");
531 
532  // Set GenericArray
533 
534  // Initial values (filled later)
535  m_initial_values = ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::GenericArray(m_values_mng);
536 
537  // Property values
538  // Extract data from string or from file in m_typed_data and store a reference on it in m_values_key
539  // Case where the string directly contains the array
540  if (property_values.data_string_content == IXMTools::IXMPropertyValuesData::DataArray)
541  m_values = ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::GenericArray(m_values_mng,values_string);
542  // Case where the string contains the address of the file containing the data
543  else if (property_values.data_string_content == IXMTools::IXMPropertyValuesData::DataFileAddress)
544  {
545  Arcane::String filename;
546  Arcane::String file_position;
547  ArcGeoSim::fileNameAndPositionFromHdfString(values_string, this->m_mesh_directory_name, filename, file_position);
548  ArcGeoSim::ParallelUtils parallel_utils(this->m_mesh->subDomain()->parallelMng());
549  m_values = ArcGeoSim::VariableUtils::GenericArray(m_values_mng,filename,file_position,parallel_utils);
550  }
551 }
552 
553 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
555 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
556 
557 class IXMStaticPropertyBuilder
558 {
559 public:
560  IXMStaticPropertyBuilder(Arcane::IMesh* mesh) : m_impl(mesh){}
561 
562  virtual ~IXMStaticPropertyBuilder() {}
563 
564 public:
565 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
566  void setGraph(Arcane::IGraph2* graph)
567  {
568  m_impl.setGraph(graph) ;
569  }
570 #endif
572  void setMeshDirectory(const Arcane::String& mesh_directory_name){m_impl.setMeshDirectory(mesh_directory_name);}
573 
575  void createAndFillProperties(const IXMPropertyDataList& properties, const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids)
576  {m_impl.createAndFillProperties(properties,aid_to_lids);}
577 
578 private:
579  IXMPropertyBuilderImpl m_impl;
580 };
581 
582 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
584 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
585 #ifdef USE_EVOLUTIVE
586 class IXMEvolutivePropertyBuilder
587 {
588 public:
589 
591  IXMEvolutivePropertyBuilder(IEvolutiveMesh* const evolutive_mesh, IMesh* const mesh)
592  : m_impl(evolutive_mesh,mesh){}
593 
595  virtual ~IXMEvolutivePropertyBuilder(){}
596 
597 public:
598 #if (ARCANE_VERSION >= 30003)
599  void setGraph(Arcane::IGraph2* graph)
600  {
601  m_impl.setGraph(graph) ;
602  }
603 #endif
604 
606  void setMeshDirectory(const Arcane::String& mesh_directory_name){m_impl.setMeshDirectory(mesh_directory_name);}
607 
609  void loadEvent(const IXMPropertyIncrementDataList& properties, const Real& event_begin_time, const Real& event_end_time)
610  {m_impl.loadEvent(properties,event_begin_time,event_end_time);}
611 
613  void loadProperty(const IXMPropertyIncrementDataList& properties, const IXMUidToLidMng& aid_to_lids,bool is_step_replayed,
614  const bool check_property_existence)
615  {m_impl.loadProperty(properties,aid_to_lids,is_step_replayed,check_property_existence);}
616 
618  bool setProperty() {return m_impl.setProperty();}
619 
621  bool computePropertyEvolution(const Real& end_timestep) {return m_impl.computePropertyEvolution(end_timestep);}
622 
624  const Arcane::VariableItemByte propertyFilledItemVariable(const String& property_name, bool& has_filled_items) const
625  {return m_impl.propertyFilledItemVariable(property_name,has_filled_items);}
626 
628  void printInfos() const {m_impl.printInfos();}
629 
632  void updateFilledItemVariables() {m_impl.updateFilledItemVariables();}
633 
635  bool hasPropertyChanged(const Arcane::String& property_name) const {return m_impl.hasPropertyChanged(property_name);}
636 
637 private:
638  IXMPropertyBuilderImpl m_impl;
639 };
640 #endif
641 
642 END_ARCGEOSIM_NAMESPACE
643 
644 
645 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_MESH_UTILS_IXMTOOLS_IXMPROPERTYBUILDER_H */
IXMPropertyBuilderImpl::BaseProperty
Definition: IXMPropertyBuilder.h:211
IXMPropertyBuilderImpl::ModifiedProperties
Ensemble de propri�t�s modifi�s par IXMPropertyBuilder.
Definition: IXMPropertyBuilder.h:141
IXMPropertyBuilderImpl::ModifiedProperty

IXMPropertyBuilderImpl::PropertyDescription
